title: SEC0: no new correctness issues in round 2
description: Round 2 review found no correctness bugs. BodyType::Rich serialize/deserialize/Display are all consistent. test_unknown_catch_all_variants_serialize_as_literal_unknown correctly excludes BodyType::Rich (hand-rolled serde, not a serde(other) catch-all). test_message_rich_body_valid_parses_as_string was correctly updated. MessageRevision.body_type type change is correct.
